name: Refined Emoji
desc: Zero-asset emoji, each deliberately chosen to actually read as its part (no cutlery forks, no planet shocks, no plain-circle tires).

name: Clean Monochrome Line
desc: Single-weight line icons drawn as literal MTB parts (fork = crown + stanchions, shock = eyelet-to-eyelet cylinder, tire = knobby ring), themed via currentColor.
